surface-panel.purpose: Dense workbench controls, step navigation, and preview areas.

primary-blue.purpose: Primary actions, active steps, selected states, and links only.

data-amber.purpose: Secondary data curves and warnings when paired with text.

section.purpose: Landing sections and primary workbench groups.

label.purpose: Buttons, field labels, step labels, and status labels.

mono.purpose: Fit metrics, column names, DPI, and export dimensions.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus and active input states.

shadows.name: plot-paper-shadow
shadows.purpose: Report chart preview lifted from the tool background.

motion.name: control-feedback
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, active, and state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Action-blue rectangular button for the main next step.
components.html: <button class="btn btn-primary">生成图像与拟合结果</button>
components.css: .btn-primary { min-height: 44px; border-radius: 6px; background: oklch(48% 0.145 255); color: oklch(98% 0.004 255); border: 1px solid oklch(48% 0.145 255); }

components.name: Instrument Panel
components.description: Neutral workbench panel with light border and compact padding.
components.css: .panel { padding: 20px; border: 1px solid oklch(21% 0.014 255 / 0.10); border-radius: 8px; background: oklch(99.2% 0.004 255); }

components.name: Step Nav Item
components.description: Task-list style step control with clear active and disabled states.
components.css: .step-nav-item.is-active { background: oklch(48% 0.145 255 / 0.10); color: oklch(20% 0.014 255); } .step-nav-item.is-active .step-index { background: oklch(48% 0.145 255); color: oklch(98% 0.004 255); }

components.name: Plot Paper
components.description: White report chart canvas embedded in a neutral tool shell.
components.css: .plot { border: 1px solid oklch(24% 0.012 255 / 0.13); border-radius: 3px; background: oklch(98.7% 0.004 95); box-shadow: 0 18px 42px oklch(21% 0.014 255 / 0.13); }

narrative.northStar: 报告纸上的轻量仪器面板
narrative.overview: LabPlot Lite uses a light report-paper surface, calm instrument panels, clear task steps, and report-ready chart output. The system borrows structure from Carbon, professional tool density from Spectrum, form clarity from GOV.UK, and chart workflow from Datawrapper and Prism.
keyCharacteristics: Light report-paper background with white chart output.
Neutral dense panels for the workbench.
Action blue only for primary actions, active steps, selected states, and links.
Data colors only inside charts and semantic states.
Readable Chinese labels and compact controls for repeated work.

rules.name: The Paper Boundary Rule
rules.body: The plot canvas must remain visibly whiter than the surrounding tool shell.

rules.name: The Blue Means Action Rule
rules.body: Blue is reserved for action, active state, selected state, and links.

rules.name: The Scan First Rule
rules.body: Workbench UI prioritizes labels, current state, and next action over expressive hero typography.

dos: Use report-paper neutrals and white chart output.
Use fit metrics, axes, and export dimensions as professional signals.
donts: Do not use dark gradients, glassmorphism, AI-tool chrome, or decorative glow.
Do not copy a single reference brand.
Do not hide errors behind color alone.
Do not make the workbench feel like a marketing page.
